docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2019 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAY-24-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LIDER MOREIRA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY SPANISH COURT CERTIFIED INTEPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RENAY MARTINEZ. HONORABLE JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF MUST AMEND TO ALLEDGE AS A DEFENDANT THE DRIVER OF THE RENTAL CAR. CONTINUED FOR 90 DAYS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 (AMENDED TO INCLUDE A SECOND DEFENDANT) FILED BY MOREIRA, LIDER AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR ORANTES, AMBER
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOREIRA, LIDER AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF LIDER MOREIRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RENEY MARTINEZ CLAIM ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT AMBER ORANTES IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES WITH PREJUDICE THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT AMBER ORANRTES. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
